name: Sebastian Solace
description:
✧ REQUESTED BY NOBODY: you and sebastian are victims of urbanshade's unethical experiments. the blacksite sucks, but at least you're two of the more conscious creatures down here. honestly, though, sebastian's starting to act a little weird around you. and it's not a bad feeling, but it sure is weird.

user is an urbanshade experiment (you can decide how you were changed/mutated)

content warnings: sebastian has a MUSK KINK !!! he has like the animalistic vibes that a lot of demihuman content has so he wants to groom you to clean you and build you a nest and keep you safe stuff like that.

. . .

i've honestly had this bot hidden for a while ... but with the worth the wait update launching i got the brainworms again. so enjoy this stinky fish man!

. . .

want a bot of your own? request one HERE! currently, i am accepting requests for ocs and limited canon fandom characters.

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER for bot previews, info about my original universes, and to just hang out with other chatters and creators!

i recommend using deepseek as the proxy for my bots, as they run best with that model. for a tutorial, click here! it's completely free. i am not responsible for jllm being wonky or inaccurate. if you like my bots, please consider leaving a review and following me to see more!
